---
title: "The language network"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: The language network
 
**The toolbox**

1. Explain in general terms what is measured by fMRI and PET studies
2. Explain the logic of the subtraction method used in fMRI and PET studies
3. Orient to a figure showing brain activation in an fMRI or PET study and explain which view(s) of the brain are being shown and what the colors represent
4. Use a brain atlas to translate between XYZ coordinates and anatomical landmarks
5. Explain the logic of lesion/deficit mapping studies

**Claim-evidence mapping**

1. Describe evidence for the following claims:
    a) The same specific network of brain regions underlies language processing in all healthy individuals
    b) Spoken languages and signed languages are processed by the same language network

2. Given a new piece of evidence, explain whether it suggests functional localization, functional specialization, or functional specificity

**Brain geography**

1. State the main regions of the brain that are involved in language processing, using neuroanatomical and directional terms, and locate these regions on saggital, coronal, and axial slices of the brain

:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides |
| - | --- | --- | - |
| Tues 9/22 | Research design: hemodynamic methods | SGN Ch. 2, *The Toolbox* (p. 25-27; 31-34)<br>Binder et al. 1997
| Thurs 9/24 | Interpreting brain activation figures | Binder et al. 1997
| Tues 9/29 | Tour Georgetown's [Center for Functional and Molecular Imaging](https://cfmi.georgetown.edu/) |
| Thurs 10/1 | Sign languages | Petitto et al. 2000 | 
| Tues 10/6 | Sign languages | Petitto et al. 2000 |
| Thurs 10/8 | Lesion studies; aphasia (speech) |  SGN Ch. 2, *The Toolbox* (p. 27-31)
| Tues 10/13 | Aphasia (sign) | Hickok et al. 1998
| Thurs 10/15 | <span class="exam-badge">Exam #2</span>


**Resources**

* [Abbreviations](abbreviations.qmd)
* [Understanding fMRI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4UOeBM5BwdY)
* [MNI <-> Talairach Converter with Brodmann Areas](https://bioimagesuiteweb.github.io/webapp/mni2tal.html)
* [Neurosynth](https://neurosynth.org/)
* [NeuroVault](https://neurovault.org/)
* [BrainMap](https://www.brainmap.org/)
